title: Drexl
content:
{{Top|canon=Unidentified beast}} {{Dablink|This article is about '''the creature'''. You may be looking for the '''[[Drexl-class starfighter|''Drexl''-class starfighter]]''' or '''[[Drexl Roosh]]'''.}} {{Species |image=[[File:Warbeast.jpg]] |name=Drexl |designation=[[Sentience/Legends|Non-sentient]] |class= |subspecies= |races= |height= |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor= |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions= |lifespan= |origin=[[Dxun/Legends|Dxun]][[Tales of the Jedi 1|''Tales of the Jedi'' 1]] |habitat=[[Jungle/Legends|Jungle]] |diet=[[Diet/Legends|Carnivorous]] |language= }} {{Quote|What an impressive, flying beast he rides! I've never seen one like it!"
"These beasts originally come from the nearby moon. The Onderonians tame them, but this one was too vicious to be handled.|[[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]] and [[Cay Qel-Droma]]|audio=Drexl-DLOTS.flac|[[Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith'' audio drama]]}} '''Drexls''', also known as '''warbeasts''', were [[Reptavian/Legends|reptavian]] winged creatures indigenous to [[Dxun/Legends|Dxun]]. ==Overview== [[File:BeastRiders-GAW.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Beast Riders astride their drexl mounts]] These winged lizards possessed heavily muscled bodies covered by purple scales. Their long necks held small heads with short, wide snouts and sharp fangs. An adult drexl's largest teeth were the length of a Human arm, and the creatures had a stature similar to that of a [[Krayt dragon/Legends|krayt dragon]] when fully grown. A fully grown male specimen had a wingspan of twenty meters across. The peculiar orbit of Dxun around [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]] allowed them to migrate to that world. Drexl began life in a [[Larva/Legends|larval]] stage and were born 3 meters tall. They had no wings in this stage, but were extremely fierce as well as vicious. These drexl larvae were more [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] in shape with two legs and two arms, three fingered, clawed hands, a tail, and three rows of spine down their back. The skin of at least some larvae was bright green unlike the dark purple of the adults.''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' Handling a single Drexl was a difficult task, often requiring three riders to accomplish it. One rider was required to focus their handling on the reins and direct the beast, while another rider was armed with a weapon, with the third rider calling out orders to the controlling rider.''[[Darth Bane: Rule of Two]]'' In many cases, drexls were resistant to the influence of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. [[Darth Bane/Legends|Darth Bane]], however, was able to [[Animal bond|subjugate a drexl's mind]] to his own on a second attempt, shortly after failing due to the unforeseen strength of the reptilian's mind, as compared to a rancor's. ==History== [[File:BeastRidersearly.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The Iziz castaways taming the beasts for the first time.]] In early stages of Onderon history, drexls were feared predators that spread terror, attacking the primitive Onderonian villages and forcing the development of the fortified city of [[Iziz/Legends|Iziz]] as the only safe place to live on the planet. The creatures were later trained as mounts by the [[Onderon/Legends|Onderonian]] outcasts, who came to be known as [[Beast Riders]]. Some received names by their riders, such [[Oron Kira|Oron Kira's]] [[Thrasher (drexl)|Thrasher]]. A drexl larva was used in [[General/Legends|General]] [[Vaklu]]'s attempted political coup to take over Onderon. This specimen was used to break down the shield barrier protecting [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Talia (Onderon)|Talia's]] throne room. The larva was later slain by [[Meetra Surik]] and her comrades. Darth Bane was also able to control a drexl when he was trying to get from [[Dxun/Legends|Dxun]] to [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]] after his spaceship crashed. Like the first drexls were able to do, he traveled from Dxun to Onderon on its back, using the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] to keep a [[Protection bubble|bubble of air for them]]. Once he arrived on [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]], his drexl, being much larger than his opponents' (and aided by Bane [[Force power/Legends|using]] the Force to [[Telekinesis/Legends|rip people off their saddle places]] and [[Force lightning/Legends|kill them with bolts of blue fire]]), defeated the beast riders that were harassing [[Darth Zannah/Legends|Darth Zannah]], his apprentice.
